mapper.sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.buyer_id, p.seller_id AS seller_id, u.name AS seller_name, o.product_id, o.lot_id, p.name AS product_name, p.category AS category, o.quantity, o.total_price, o.status, o.order_date, r.review_id AS review_id FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON p.seller_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.order_id = o.order_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(buyer_id, product_id, lot_id, quantity, total_price, status) VALUES (#{buyerId}, #{productId}, #{lotId}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{status})
mapper.select: WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
